snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi()
client.create_plant_order(
    plant_id="plantId",
    order_id="orderId",
    amount=1.1,
    currency="currency",
    plant_name="plantName",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi()


async def main() -> None:
    await client.create_plant_order(
        plant_id="plantId",
        order_id="orderId",
        amount=1.1,
        currency="currency",
        plant_name="plantName",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
